pages.text:
ClearPay Technologies Ltd.

Period: Q2 2025

ClearPay Technologies provides embedded payment rails and automated reconciliation tooling to mid-market B2B platforms in
North America and the UK. Revenue is a blend of basis-point fees on processed volume, monthly platform access fees, and
implementation services. ClearPay holds a U.S. money transmitter licence in 42 states.

Financial Snapshot – Q2 2025

| Metric | Q2 2025 | Q1 2025 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Total Payment Volume(TPV) | $3.42B | $3.11B |
| Net Revenue(take-rate based) | $14.8M | $13.5M |
| Effective Take Rate | 43bps | 43bps |
| Platform Access Revenue | $2.1M | $1.9M |
| Implementation Services Revenue | $0.4M | $0.7M |
| Total Recognized Revenue | $17.3M | $16.1M |
| Gross Margin | 67% | 66% |
| Total Headcount | 211 | 203 |
| Cash&Restricted Cash | $38.4M | $40.1M |

Cash & Restricted Cash includes $6.2M held in segregated client float accounts as required under state money transmitter
regulations. Available operating cash at period end was $32.2M. Implementation Services revenue declined QoQ as the large Q1
onboarding cohort moved to steady-state.

| Metric | Q2 2025 | Q1 2025 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Active Connected Platforms | 184 | 171 |
| Transactions Processed(QTD) | 28.6M | 26.1M |
| Avg. Transaction Size | $119.6 | $119.2 |
| Payment Failure Rate | 0.31% | 0.34% |
| Reconciliation Accuracy Rate | 99.87% | 99.84% |
| API Uptime(SLA:99.9%) | 99.94% | 99.91% |

* * *

_(2) Effective Take Rate computed as net revenue divided by TPV; excludes platform access and implementation revenue._ _(3) Restricted Cash of $6.2M is excluded from all liquidity and runway calculations._ _(4) Payment Failure Rate reflects hard failures at authorization; excludes soft declines resolved within 24 hours._ _(5) This document does not constitute a prospectus or offer of securities._
